import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

// Pin (c), fail closed: the receiver is an expression (a getLogger() call), not a
// variable whose declaration this file carries. Its type cannot be resolved from
// a declaration, so it is not recognized - the caller must route through a
// declared field, tier-2, or a marker.
class Slf4jUnknownReceiver {
    void expressionReceiver() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            LoggerFactory.getLogger(Slf4jUnknownReceiver.class).error("boom", e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
